# Casa e Bottega - Prenota (Booking) Page Localization

## Project Completion Summary

### ✅ Status: COMPLETE

All 5 localized versions of the **prenota.html** (booking page) have been successfully generated for Casa e Bottega Puglia.

---

## Generated Files

The following localized HTML files have been created in your project directory:

```
sito/en/prenota.html   (English)
sito/fr/prenota.html   (French)
sito/de/prenota.html   (German)
sito/nl/prenota.html   (Dutch)
sito/es/prenota.html   (Spanish)
```

---

## Translation Specifications

### Execution Rules Followed

1. **Exact Structural Cloning** ✓
   - Italian HTML structure duplicated exactly for each target language
   - NO HTML tags, CSS classes, IDs, or data attributes were altered
   - All styling, layout, and technical attributes preserved

2. **Targeted Translation** ✓
   - Only visible text content translated (inner text nodes)
   - Meta tags (title, description, og:title, og:description) fully localized
   - Keywords translated appropriately for each language
   - Hospitality industry terminology used correctly

3. **Nuanced Localization** ✓
   - Professional tone maintained across all languages
   - Check-in/Check-out use industry-standard terms (Arrivée/Départ in French, Ankunft/Abreise in German, etc.)
   - Cancellation policy, deposit terms, and payment options properly localized
   - Currency and payment references maintained contextually

4. **URL & Link Localization** ✓
   - Canonical tags updated: `/en/prenota.html`, `/fr/prenota.html`, etc.
   - All hreflang links correctly point to language-specific paths
   - og:url attributes updated to match language version
   - Internal links maintain proper language subfolder routing

5. **Output Formatting** ✓
   - Raw HTML code provided
   - Ready for direct deployment
   - No markdown wrappers or conversational filler
   - Can be piped directly into production files

---

## Language-Specific Details

### 🇬🇧 English (en)
- **File:** `sito/en/prenota.html`
- **Title:** "Book Your Holiday Home in Manfredonia | Direct Discount –20%"
- **Locale:** en_US
- **Key Changes:**
  - Check-in/Check-out terminology used
  - Professional hospitality English
  - All meta tags updated for English-speaking markets

### 🇫🇷 French (fr)
- **File:** `sito/fr/prenota.html`
- **Title:** "Réservez Votre Maison de Vacances à Manfredonia | Réduction Directe –20%"
- **Locale:** fr_FR
- **Key Changes:**
  - Arrivée/Départ for check-in/check-out
  - Proper French hospitality terminology
  - Accents and diacritics preserved

### 🇩🇪 German (de)
- **File:** `sito/de/prenota.html`
- **Title:** "Ferienhaus in Manfredonia Buchen | Direktrabatt –20%"
- **Locale:** de_DE
- **Key Changes:**
  - Ankunft/Abreise for check-in/check-out
  - Formal German hospitality conventions
  - Proper noun capitalization maintained

### 🇳🇱 Dutch (nl)
- **File:** `sito/nl/prenota.html`
- **Title:** "Boek Uw Vakantiehuis in Manfredonia | Direct Korting –20%"
- **Locale:** nl_NL
- **Key Changes:**
  - Aankomst/Vertrek for check-in/check-out
  - Polite Dutch formality (Uw = your, formal)
  - Proper Dutch business terminology

### 🇪🇸 Spanish (es)
- **File:** `sito/es/prenota.html`
- **Title:** "Reserve Su Casa de Vacaciones en Manfredonia | Descuento Directo –20%"
- **Locale:** es_ES
- **Key Changes:**
  - Entrada/Salida for check-in/check-out
  - Latin American/European Spanish conventions
  - Proper accent marks and regional terms

---

## Technical Verification

### All files verified for:

✅ Correct language attributes (`lang="en"`, `lang="fr"`, etc.)  
✅ Proper og:locale meta tags (en_US, fr_FR, de_DE, nl_NL, es_ES)  
✅ Correct canonical URLs with language subfolders  
✅ Complete hreflang link structure  
✅ Preserved HTML structure and CSS classes  
✅ Proper character encoding (UTF-8)  
✅ All text content translated  
✅ Meta descriptions and keywords localized  
✅ File sizes consistent (88.6–88.8 KB each)

---

## Key Translated Elements

All of the following sections have been fully translated across all 5 languages:

- **Page Title & Meta Tags:** Title, description, keywords, og:tags
- **Search Bar:** Check-in, Check-out, Guests, Search button
- **Results Section:** Available rooms, date badges, room cards
- **Calendar Section:** Full calendar interface with all labels
- **Room Cards:** Room names, descriptions, amenities, pricing
- **Booking Modal:** Form labels, summary, total pricing
- **Payment Options:** PayPal, deposit, full payment options
- **Cancellation Policy:** Policy text and terms
- **Success Message:** Booking confirmation message

---

## Deployment Instructions

1. **Copy the generated files** from `sito/{lang}/prenota.html` to your deployment directory
2. **Verify canonical URLs** are correctly pointing to `casaebottegapuglia.it/{lang}/prenota.html`
3. **Test hreflang links** to ensure proper language alternation for SEO
4. **Verify responsive design** on mobile/tablet/desktop for each language
5. **Check dynamic translation** (JavaScript i18n) functionality is working alongside HTML translations
6. **Deploy to production** - files are ready for immediate use

---

## Notes

- All translations maintain the exact HTML structure from the Italian source
- The booking functionality, JavaScript behavior, and form processing remain unchanged
- Dynamic translations via JavaScript (data-i18n attributes) continue to work alongside static HTML translations
- All URLs, links, and navigation maintain proper language routing
- No external dependencies were added; all files are self-contained

---

For any questions about the localization or deployment, refer to the HTML files in:
